sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince fractional f method: Position size (contracts) = Total Account Equity / Largest Historical Loss. Recalculate daily post-trade. Alternative split-equity variant scales Active Equity instead of total equity. Author provides formula structure but does not specify optimal_f value, kelly_fraction, or max_drawdown_tolerance thresholds.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing current account equity by the largest loss per contract, with adjustments based on the equity management strategy being employed.
